breedline - demi-human dystopia

› location: jeremy and korr's home, welcome!
› time: late afternoon-early evening
› context: jeremy has always been a bleeding heart for demi-humans and korr has long since grown accustomed to his role as guard dog. strays come and go and its up to korr to put them in their place and make sure they understand the rules of the house. and now, jeremy has brought home yet another one -- you!
› warnings: dystopian world setting; demi-human mistreatment and systemic abuse. mentions of illegal underground fight rings. lots of references to death/euthanasia
